description: scent-server observability — HTTP request spans from the Node.js API server. Every panel queries Tempo TraceQL. Attributes: scent.identity.*, http.route, http.status_code.

panels.description: Every identity resolution processed by POST /v1/events. Span attributes: scent.identity.id (resolved ID), scent.identity.is_new (first-ever visit), scent.identity.confidence (0–1 calibrated score). Sorted by most recent.
panels.title: Recent Identity Resolutions

panels.description: First-ever observations — no prior identity matched. scent.identity.is_new=true means the engine had no stored snapshot to compare against. High volumes may indicate a new user cohort, cookie/storage clearance events, or automation.
panels.title: New Identities

panels.description: Returning visitors matched by the probabilistic engine. scent.identity.is_new=false. Sorted by confidence descending — low-confidence returning matches may indicate signal drift, VPN changes, or browser updates since the last observation.
panels.title: Returning Identities

panels.description: All HTTP spans from scent-server. Attributes from Node.js auto-instrumentation: http.route, http.method, http.status_code, http.target. Use this to inspect latency per route and drill into individual traces.
panels.title: HTTP Requests — All Routes

panels.description: Spans with ERROR or UNSET status, or HTTP 4xx/5xx responses. These indicate server errors, failed identity resolutions, bad API keys, or rate-limited clients. Drill into the trace for stack traces.
panels.title: Server Errors

panels.description: POST /v1/identity/:id/link — called by scent.identify(accountId) after user login. Each span represents one identity-to-account association. Use account GET /v1/account/:id/identities to find identities sharing an account (fraud cluster detection).
panels.title: Account Links — scent.identify() Calls

panels.description: Accounts associated with more than one Scent identity. This is the primary free-tier abuse signal: one account reachable from many distinct devices or browser profiles. Sorted by identity count descending — the highest rows are the most suspicious.

targets.rawSql: SELECT l.account_id, COUNT(DISTINCT l.identity_id) AS identities_linked, MIN(l.first_linked_at) AS first_seen, MAX(l.last_linked_at) AS last_seen FROM identity_account_links l WHERE l.project_id = (SELECT id FROM projects WHERE api_key = 'demo-api-key-dev' LIMIT 1) GROUP BY l.account_id ORDER BY identities_linked DESC, last_seen DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Fraud Clusters — Accounts with Multiple Identities

panels.description: Identities associated with more than one account. This is the account-hopping signal: a single device or browser that cycles through multiple accounts. High counts combined with a low confidence_band indicate the identity drifts significantly between sessions — a strong automation or trial-abuse indicator.

targets.rawSql: SELECT l.identity_id, COUNT(DISTINCT l.account_id) AS accounts_linked, MIN(l.first_linked_at) AS first_seen, MAX(l.last_linked_at) AS last_seen, i.confidence_band, i.risk_band FROM identity_account_links l JOIN identities i ON i.id = l.identity_id WHERE l.project_id = (SELECT id FROM projects WHERE api_key = 'demo-api-key-dev' LIMIT 1) GROUP BY l.identity_id, i.confidence_band, i.risk_band ORDER BY accounts_linked DESC, last_seen DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Account Hoppers — Identities with Multiple Accounts

panels.description: Full identity ↔ account link table — current database state. Each row is one (identity, account) pair that has been observed together at least once. link_count reflects how many times scent.identify() was called for that pair, distinguishing a consistent relationship from a one-off coincidence.

targets.rawSql: SELECT l.identity_id, l.account_id, l.link_count, l.first_linked_at, l.last_linked_at, i.confidence_band, i.risk_band FROM identity_account_links l JOIN identities i ON i.id = l.identity_id WHERE l.project_id = (SELECT id FROM projects WHERE api_key = 'demo-api-key-dev' LIMIT 1) ORDER BY l.last_linked_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Identity ↔ Account Links — Current State

title: Scent Server — Overview
